A '''battle''' was fought on a [[Unidentified purple planet|planet]] between the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] and the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].

==The battle==
[[File:Battle_of_Unknown_Planet.jpg|thumb|left|190px|[[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone troopers]] surrendering to an overwhelming number of [[Droid/Legends|droids]]]]
During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Republic Military/Legends|forces]] were present on a [[Unidentified purple planet|planet]]. Sometime between the [[Battle of Bal'demnic|battle]] of [[Bal'demnic/Legends|Bal'demnic]] and the [[Battle of Orto|invasion]] of [[Orto/Legends|Orto]], the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]] attacked the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] with a [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of [[Providence-class carrier/destroyer/Legends|''Providence''-class carrier/destroyers]]. The Separatists then invaded the planet with [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]] and [[OG-9 homing spider droid/Legends|OG-9 homing spider droids]]. The battle ended when countless [[Droid/Legends|droids]] surrounded just a handful of [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]], forcing them to surrender.<ref name="CW22" />

==Behind the scenes==
This battle first appeared in the [[Chapter 22 (Star Wars: Clone Wars)|twenty-second]] episode of the animated television series ''[[Star Wars: Clone Wars]]'', which originally aired on [[Cartoon Network]] on [[March 22]], [[2005]].<ref name="CW22" />
